info.title: Firefli API
info.description: Firefli workspace management API for members, activity, sessions, content, and alliances

get.description: Retrieve workspace metadata, branding, and member overview.
Retrieve workspace leaderboard data including top players by playtime and sessions.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID to include their position in the 'you' object

get.description: Get all workspace members with their roles and permissions
Retrieve upcoming birthdays from your workspace members
Retrieve activity logs for workspace members with filtering options
Retrieve detailed activity logs for a specific workspace member
Retrieve detailed activity logs for a specific workspace member
Retrieve upcoming and past sessions with date and category filtering
Retrieve workspace wall posts with pagination and author information

post.description: Create a new wall post with optional image attachment

get.description: Retrieve all workspace documents and guides with pagination
Retrieve a specific document with full content, metadata, and author information
Retrieve a list of all notices/timeoff requests with optional filtering.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status: pending, approved, rejected, active

post.description: Create a new notice/timeoff request for a user.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific notice.

patch.description: Update the status of a notice to approve, reject, or modify details.

delete.description: Immediately stop an active notice by setting end time to now.

get.description: Retrieve all notices for a specific user with optional filtering.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status: pending, approved, rejected, active

get.description: Retrieve summary statistics for all notices in the workspace.
Retrieve all workspace alliances with representatives and recent visit history
Retrieve a session with all role assignments and slot information.

post.description: Assign or unassign users to session roles, or update the session host.

action.description: Whether to assign or unassign the user

userId.description: Roblox user ID of the user to assign/unassign

roleId.description: Slot UUID from the session type (use GET /sessions/sets or GET /sessions/{sessionId}/roles to get slot IDs)

slot.description: Zero-based slot index within the role

get.description: Retrieve all active session role sets (role templates) for a workspace. Use the returned IDs in roleSetIds when creating sessions inline.

id.description: Role set UUID — use this in roleSetIds

hostRole.description: Host designation: primary host, secondary/co-host, or null for regular participant

slots.description: Number of slots for this role

post.description: Create an unscheduled session, optionally creating a new session type inline using role set IDs from Get Session Role Sets.

sessionTypeId.description: Existing session type ID (use this OR sessionType, not both)

sessionType.description: Create session type inline (use this OR sessionTypeId, not both)

roleSetIds.description: Array of role set UUIDs from Get Session Role Sets. Defines the role slots for the session including primary/secondary host designations.

time.description: Session time in HH:MM format (24-hour, UTC)

name.description: Custom session name (overrides session type name)

post.description: Create a scheduled session, optionally creating a new session type and schedule inline using role set IDs from Get Session Role Sets.

scheduleId.description: Existing schedule ID (use this OR sessionType, not both)

sessionType.description: Create session type and schedule inline (use this OR scheduleId, not both)

roleSetIds.description: Array of role set UUIDs from Get Session Role Sets. Defines the role slots for the session including primary/secondary host designations.

date.description: Session date (YYYY-MM-DD) - must match a day in schedule

name.description: Custom session name (overrides session type name)

post.description: Add a note entry to a user's logbook.
Add a warning entry to a user's logbook.
Add a promotion entry to a user's logbook and rank them up one rank if a ranking system is configured.
Add a demotion entry to a user's logbook and rank them down one rank if a ranking system is configured.
Add a termination entry to a user's logbook. Sets rank to lowest and removes workspace roles if a ranking system is configured.
Add a rank change entry to a user's logbook and set them to a specific rank if a ranking system is configured.

targetRank.description: Target role number to set the user to

get.description: Returns userbook entries (warnings, promotions, demotions, terminations, rank changes, notes) for the specified workspace with full author and user details.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Filter entries for a specific user ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of entries to return (default: 50, max: 100)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of entries to skip for pagination

get.description: Get a paginated list of recommendations with optional filtering

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

post.description: Create a new recommendation for a member

get.description: Get a specific recommendation with votes and comments

delete.description: Delete a recommendation (also deletes all votes and comments)

deletedById.description: User ID of the person deleting the recommendation

get.description: Get all votes for a recommendation

post.description: Add a vote to a recommendation

userId.description: User ID of the person voting

error.example: User has already voted on this recommendation

delete.description: Remove a vote from a recommendation

userId.description: User ID of the person removing their vote

get.description: Get all comments for a recommendation

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

post.description: Add a comment to a recommendation

get.description: Get a specific comment

patch.description: Update a comment's content or image

delete.description: Delete a comment from a recommendation

authorId.description: User ID of the person deleting the comment

hostRole.description: Host designation: primary host, secondary/co-host, or null for regular participant roles

weight.description: Display order weight for this slot (lower = higher up)

categoryId.description: ID of the category this slot belongs to, or null

categoryName.description: Display name of the category, or null for uncategorised slots

categoryWeight.description: Display order weight of the category (uncategorised slots always appear last)

color.description: Hex color code for the tag

primaryHost.description: The primary host of the session — user assigned to the slot with hostRole 'primary'

roleId.description: The slot ID the primary host is assigned to

secondaryHosts.description: Co-hosts — users assigned to slots with hostRole 'secondary'

roleId.description: The slot ID the secondary host is assigned to

participants.description: Regular participants — users assigned to slots with no host designation (hostRole is null)

thumbnail.description: URL to the user's avatar thumbnail

slot.description: The slot index the user is assigned to

weight.description: Display order weight of the assigned role

categoryId.description: ID of the category for the assigned role, or null

categoryName.description: Display name of the category for the assigned role, or null

categoryWeight.description: Display order weight of the assigned role's category

in_game.description: Whether user is currently in game
Whether you are currently in game

reviewed.description: Whether the notice has been reviewed

revoked.description: Whether the notice has been revoked

reason.description: Reason or notes for the entry

adminId.description: Admin user ID who created the entry

rankBefore.description: Rank number before the action (null if no ranking configured)

rankAfter.description: Rank number after the action (null if no ranking configured)

updatedAt.description: When the entry was last updated

redacted.description: Whether this entry has been redacted

redactedBy.description: ID of the admin who redacted the entry

admin.description: Admin user who created the entry

terminated.description: Whether the user was terminated (always true for this endpoint)

limit.description: Number of entries returned in this response

hasMore.description: Whether there are more entries available

roles.description: All role slots defined on this session's type, each with their current assignments

hostRole.description: Host designation: primary host, secondary/co-host, or null for regular participant roles

maxSlots.description: Number of available slots for this role

categoryId.description: ID of the category this role belongs to, or null

categoryName.description: Display name of the category, or null for uncategorised

categoryWeight.description: Display order weight of the category (uncategorised always last)

primaryHost.description: User assigned to the slot with hostRole 'primary'

secondaryHosts.description: Users assigned to slots with hostRole 'secondary'

participants.description: Users assigned to slots with no host designation (hostRole is null)

targetPicture.description: Profile picture URL of the recommended user

createdById.description: User ID who created the recommendation

createdByName.description: Name of the user who created the recommendation

editedById.description: User ID who last edited the recommendation

editedByName.description: Name of the user who last edited

editedAt.description: When the recommendation was last edited

statusChangedById.description: User ID who last changed the status

statusChangedByName.description: Name of the user who last changed the status

statusChangedAt.description: When the status was last changed

updatedAt.description: When the recommendation was last updated

recommendationId.description: Recommendation ID this vote belongs to
Recommendation ID this comment belongs to

authorId.description: User ID of the comment author

authorPicture.description: Profile picture URL of the author

image.description: Optional image URL attached to the comment

updatedAt.description: When the comment was last updated

statusChangedById.description: User ID changing the status (required if status is provided)

statusChangedByName.description: Name of the user changing status (optional)

editedById.description: User ID editing the recommendation (required if reason is provided)

authorId.description: User ID of the comment author

UnauthorizedError.description: Authentication failed or API key missing
